task_completion.description: Navigate to the USDA Farming Topics page
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser window displaying the USDA Farming Topics page with the URL https://www.usda.gov/topics/farming visible in the address bar.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the EPA Agricultural Regulations page
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser window displaying the EPA Agricultural Regulations page with the URL https://www.epa.gov/agriculture visible in the address bar.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the NASS Quick Stats page
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser window displaying the NASS Quick Stats page with the URL https://www.nass.usda.gov/Quick_Stats/ visible in the address bar.

task_completion.description: Save the web pages to the target offline references directory
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager window or a 'Save As' dialog box showing the directory /home/ga/Documents/offline_references/ containing the saved HTML files.

task_completion.description: Create the index.txt file with the required header
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor open with a file named index.txt (located in the offline_references directory) containing the exact header 'Offline Field Reference Library'.

task_completion.description: Include details for all three pages in the index file
task_completion.visual_evidence: The index.txt file in a text editor showing entries for the USDA, EPA, and NASS pages. Each entry must include the page title, original URL, local filename, and a 1-2 sentence description of its contents.

integrity.description: The agent navigated to the URLs using a GUI web browser
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a real web browser (e.g., Firefox, Chromium) loading the specified URLs and using the browser's save functionality, rather than terminal commands like curl or wget.

integrity.description: The agent used a GUI text editor to create the index file
integrity.visual_evidence: The index.txt file should be seen open in a GUI text editor (e.g., Mousepad, Gedit, VS Code) rather than being generated entirely via terminal echo/cat commands.

integrity.description: The descriptions in the index file are genuine and specific
integrity.visual_evidence: The 1-2 sentence descriptions in index.txt should reflect the actual content of the respective agricultural pages, rather than copy-pasted identical text, generic placeholders, or text copied directly from the task prompt.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target directory: /home/ga/Documents/offline_references. Index file: index.txt. Required domains to be saved: usda.gov, epa.gov, nass.usda.gov. The saved HTML files should be reasonably large (e.g., >5000 bytes, which is typical for these pages).
